basics.name: Fahridana Ahmad Rayyansyah
basics.summary: Software engineer building scalable web and mobile applications. Focused on clean architecture, performance optimization, and production-ready systems.

points: Built a Performance Appraisal system in Laravel 12 with dynamic routing, period observers, and cascading data generation for quarterly employee evaluations.
Implemented bulk Excel import/export, reducing evaluation data entry from 3 days to 2 hours per cycle.
Gathered requirements and iterated features through weekly sprint reviews with internal stakeholders.
Built UI features in Next.js 14, React 18, and TypeScript with WCAG accessibility standards and cross-browser consistency.
Integrated OpenAI API for automated video summarization and keyword extraction, reducing manual processing overhead by 40%.
Contributed to a shared Radix UI component library with Storybook and Jest, ensuring visual consistency across the product.

projects.name: Cache Strategy Benchmarking — Moodle-Inspired LMS
points: Built a Moodle-inspired LMS benchmark in Laravel 12 comparing Cache-Aside, Read-Through, and Write-Through strategies using Redis 7.
Validated architectural decisions by executing a k6 benchmarking suite simulating up to 2,000 concurrent users and analyzing P99 latency.

projects.name: HRIS — Human Resource Information System
points: Engineered a multi-tenant HRIS with Clean Architecture in Go and Next.js, integrating Midtrans payment gateways for subscription billing.
Developed a geofencing attendance system with real-time mapping via TanStack Query and Supabase Auth, containerized with Docker and deployed via CI/CD to Azure.

projects.name: Leafolyze — Leaf Tomato Disease Analyzer
points: Built a cross-platform Flutter app using the BLoC pattern with on-device TensorFlow Lite inference for offline tomato disease detection.
Integrated a marketplace and RESTful data layer using the Repository pattern and Dio for seamless authentication and content sync.
